subject: [PATCH pynfs 07/13] server41tests: test COPY with bad destination stateid

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test case to the server41tests suite, which verifies that the NFS server returns an error when the destination stateid in a COPY operation is invalid. The test case creates a source file and then attempts to copy it to a destination with an intentionally bad stateid, checking that the server responds correctly by returning NFS4ERR_BAD_STATEID.
